channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-04-20 06:11 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: These redwoods are older than many civilizations Many were already growing while the Roman Empire wa...
item.description: These redwoods are older than many civilizations Many were already growing while the Roman Empire was still around

item.title: @elonmusk: Fury As Nigerian Migrant Caught Cooking Cat In Public Park Next To Children's Playgroundzerohedge.co...
item.description: Fury As Nigerian Migrant Caught Cooking Cat In Public Park Next To Children's Playgroundzerohedge.com/geopolitical/f…

item.title: @elonmusk: Just got access to Grok 4.3 and the first thing I did was throw the hardest task I usually run on cl...
item.description: Just got access to Grok 4.3 and the first thing I did was throw the hardest task I usually run on claude to test it gave it a complex research prompt on deepseek: >thought for 13 mins and 17 seconds >created a project folder on its own >produced multiple files, cross-referenced with source verification >8,365 words this model is serious for hardcore research

item.title: @elonmusk: "Things will just be free in the future. Sounds nuts, but if you've got an AI or robotics economy th...
item.description: "Things will just be free in the future. Sounds nuts, but if you've got an AI or robotics economy that is anywhere close to million times the size of the current Earth economy, literally any need you possibly want can be met. If you can think of it, you can have it" 一 Elon Musk

item.title: @elonmusk: Alex Soros alla conferenza dei progressisti a Barcellona, insieme a Elly Schlein, che attacca Elon M...
item.description: Alex Soros alla conferenza dei progressisti a Barcellona, insieme a Elly Schlein, che attacca Elon Musk. Non solo presenza: Soros contribuisce anche all’organizzazione. Morale della favola: se un multimiliardario americano finanzia e sostiene la sinistra europea con soldi fatti tramite speculazione finanziaria, è tutto legittimo. Se un altro imprenditore americano si limita a esprimere opinioni a favore di idee condivise da partiti di destra, diventa un pericolo per la democrazia. Ok

item.title: @elonmusk: Falcon 9 launches 25@Starlinksatellites from California ahead of completing the 600th overall landin...
item.description: Falcon 9 launches 25@Starlinksatellites from California ahead of completing the 600th overall landing of an orbital class rocket

item.description: Plugins for Excel, PowerPoint, Word, … coming soon

item.title: @elonmusk: Only Grok 4.3 lets me drive my car to get gas. ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini want me to walk.
item.description: Only Grok 4.3 lets me drive my car to get gas. ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini want me to walk.

item.title: @elonmusk: Wait? What did I just read? Grok 4.3 just broke the game?@xAIdropped the nuke:@Grokcan now spit out ...
item.description: Wait? What did I just read? Grok 4.3 just broke the game?@xAIdropped the nuke:@Grokcan now spit out full Microsoft Word docs, PDFs, PowerPoints, and Excel spreadsheets on command. No more "sorry I can’t generate files" excuses, this AI is actually useful AF@elonmusk

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla vient d'allumer à Corpus Christi (çà ne s'invente pas...) la première raffinerie majeure de li...
item.description: Tesla vient d'allumer à Corpus Christi (çà ne s'invente pas...) la première raffinerie majeure de lithium des États-Unis, et ce qui me frappe n'est pas le made in USA. C'est que Musk a balancé l'approche standard à la poubelle pour repenser entièrement le procédé from scratch. La raffinerie tourne sans acide sulfurique. Six étapes au lieu de huit à douze, un million de véhicules électriques par an en capacité nominale, 50 GWh à terme. Pas de sulfate de sodium toxique à gérer derrière, juste un résidu minéral quasi inerte qu'ils appellent analcime. Sur le papier ça sent le storytelling, sauf que l'usine tourne vraiment depuis janvier et que l'investissement a dépassé le milliard de dollars. C'est la réponse industrielle à quinze ans de dépendance chinoise sur le raffinage. La Chine contrôle la majorité du lithium raffiné mondial, pas parce qu'elle a les gisements, mais parce qu'elle a absorbé les externalités environnementales qu'aucune boîte occidentale ne voulait assumer. Tesla prouve qu'on peut contourner le problème au lieu de le subventionner.

item.title: @elonmusk: As grok gets better it has less and less patience for the cretins
item.description: As grok gets better it has less and less patience for the cretins
